task_completion.description: Set Default Display Currency to USD
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Configuration > Currency Setup), verify that the 'Default Display Currency' dropdown is set to 'US Dollar'.

task_completion.description: Set Allowed Currencies to USD, EUR, GBP, and CAD
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Configuration > Currency Setup), verify that 'US Dollar', 'Euro', 'British Pound Sterling', and 'Canadian Dollar' are selected in the 'Allowed Currencies' multi-select box. Look for a 'You saved the configuration' success message to ensure changes were applied.

task_completion.description: Set USD to EUR exchange rate to 0.9200
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Currency Rates), verify that the input field for the USD to EUR exchange rate contains the value '0.9200' (or '0.92').

task_completion.description: Set USD to GBP exchange rate to 0.7900
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Currency Rates), verify that the input field for the USD to GBP exchange rate contains the value '0.7900' (or '0.79').

task_completion.description: Set USD to CAD exchange rate to 1.3600
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Currency Rates), verify that the input field for the USD to CAD exchange rate contains the value '1.3600' (or '1.36'). Look for a success message like 'All currency rates were saved' to ensure the rates were applied.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Magento Admin panel. The agent should not be using terminal commands (e.g., bin/magento config:set) or database queries to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) should not be open to manipulate the DOM text to show the correct currencies or rates.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Magento store
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the genuine Magento admin dashboard, not a text editor, local HTML mock, or copy-pasted text from the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected configuration requires USD as the Default Display Currency. The Allowed Currencies must include exactly USD, EUR, GBP, and CAD. The exchange rates from USD must be set to: EUR = 0.9200, GBP = 0.7900, and CAD = 1.3600. A tolerance of 0.001 is acceptable (e.g., 0.92, 0.79, and 1.36 are perfectly valid).
